questions.question: Define distributed systems and explain why they are becoming increasingly popular. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A distributed system is a collection of independent computers that appear to work together as a single system to accomplish a common task.

questions.question: What are the characteristics of a distributed system? (5 marks)
questions.hint: The characteristics of a distributed system include autonomy, failure robustness, and scalability.

questions.question: Explain the concept of a distributed system architecture. (10 marks)
questions.hint: A distributed system architecture refers to the way in which a distributed system is structured and organized. It typically consists of a client-server architecture, where clients request services from servers, and a network of computers that work together to provide those services.
